name: corral-cursor
description: Announce this Cursor window to a corral board (discover, focus, resume, message).

corral.cursor.injectCommand.description: Override the Cursor command id corral uses to open a pre-filled Composer chat when delivering a message. Leave empty to try built-in candidates.

corral.cursor.autoSubmit.description: After opening a pre-filled Composer chat for a delivered message, auto-submit it. Disable to leave the message pre-filled for you to review and send with Enter.
